fields.summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping make_context calls with 'with' statements in _resolve_context

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Done: wrapped the 3 make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with ... as ctx' statements (main ctx, sub_ctx for non-chained groups, sub_sub_ctx for chained groups) to fix resource leak; also updated Context.exit() docstring in core.py. Call sites remain explicit (cli.make_context(...), cmd.make_context(...) x2) so you can add validate_nesting=False kwargs there without conflict. No other core.py changes made.

fields.summary: Done: wrapped the 3 make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with ... as ctx' statements (main ctx, sub_ctx for non-chained groups, sub_sub_ctx for chained groups) to fix resource leak; also updated Context.exit() docstring in core.py. Call sites remain explicit (cli.make_context(...), cmd.make_context(...) x2) so you can add validate_nesting=False kwargs there without conflict. No other core.py changes made.
